lines.english: How did the woman get help?
lines.chinese: 这位妇女是怎样获得救援的？
lines.raw: How did the woman get help? | 这位妇女是怎样获得救援的？

lines.english: When a light passenger plane flew off course some time ago,
lines.chinese: 前些日子，一架小型客机偏离航线
lines.raw: When a light passenger plane flew off course some time ago, | 前些日子，一架小型客机偏离航线

lines.english: it crashed in the mountains and its pilot was killed.
lines.chinese: 在山区坠毁，飞行员当场丧生。
lines.raw: it crashed in the mountains and its pilot was killed. | 在山区坠毁，飞行员当场丧生。

lines.english: The only passengers, a young woman and her two baby daughters, were unhurt.
lines.chinese: 唯一的乘客，一位年轻的妇女和她的两个女婴却安然无恙。
lines.raw: The only passengers, a young woman and her two baby daughters, were unhurt. | 唯一的乘客，一位年轻的妇女和她的两个女婴却安然无恙。

lines.english: It was the middle of winter.
lines.raw: It was the middle of winter. | 那时正值隆冬。

lines.english: Snow lay thick on the ground.
lines.chinese: 地上覆盖着厚厚的积雪。
lines.raw: Snow lay thick on the ground. | 地上覆盖着厚厚的积雪。

lines.english: When it grew dark, she turned a suitcase into a bed and put the children inside it,
lines.chinese: 天黑时，她把一只手提箱当作小床，把孩子们放了进去，
lines.raw: When it grew dark, she turned a suitcase into a bed and put the children inside it, | 天黑时，她把一只手提箱当作小床，把孩子们放了进去，

lines.english: covering them with all the clothes she could find.
lines.chinese: 又把自己能找到的所有衣服都盖在了她们身上。
lines.raw: covering them with all the clothes she could find. | 又把自己能找到的所有衣服都盖在了她们身上。

lines.english: During the night, it got terribly cold.
lines.chinese: 夜里，天气变得异常寒冷。
lines.raw: During the night, it got terribly cold. | 夜里，天气变得异常寒冷。

lines.english: The woman kept as near as she could to the children and even tried to get into the case herself, but it was too small.
lines.chinese: 妇女尽可能地靠近孩子，甚至想自己也钻进箱子里，但箱子太小了。
lines.raw: The woman kept as near as she could to the children and even tried to get into the case herself, but it was too small. | 妇女尽可能地靠近孩子，甚至想自己也钻进箱子里，但箱子太小了。
Early next morning, | 第二天清早，

lines.english: she heard planes passing overhead and wondered how she could send a signal.
lines.chinese: 她听到飞机从头顶飞过，心想该如何发出求救信号呢？
lines.raw: she heard planes passing overhead and wondered how she could send a signal. | 她听到飞机从头顶飞过，心想该如何发出求救信号呢？

lines.english: Then she had an idea. She stamped out the letters 'SOS' in the snow.
lines.chinese: 接着她有了一个主意。她在雪地上踩出了“SOS”这几个字母。
lines.raw: Then she had an idea. She stamped out the letters 'SOS' in the snow. | 接着她有了一个主意。她在雪地上踩出了“SOS”这几个字母。

lines.english: Fortunately, a pilot saw the signal and sent a message by radio to the nearest town.
lines.chinese: 幸运的是，一名飞行员看到了这个信号，并用无线电把消息发给了最近的城镇。
lines.raw: Fortunately, a pilot saw the signal and sent a message by radio to the nearest town. | 幸运的是，一名飞行员看到了这个信号，并用无线电把消息发给了最近的城镇。

lines.english: It was not long before a helicopter arrived on the scene to rescue the survivors of the plane crash.
lines.chinese: 不久，一架直升机飞抵现场，营救了这次飞机坠毁事故的幸存者。
lines.raw: It was not long before a helicopter arrived on the scene to rescue the survivors of the plane crash. | 不久，一架直升机飞抵现场，营救了这次飞机坠毁事故的幸存者。
